inspect-canvasdemo
FeaturesStoryGitHub
✦Figma-like browser inspector

Edit your design in the browser, not in code

Click any element. Change colours, fonts, spacing. Save back to your source files — without touching DevTools or going back to Figma.

[ Demo preview ]

Everything designers need

Built for the gap between Figma and DevTools.

🖱️

Click to select

Click any element in the preview and its properties appear instantly — no digging through DevTools.

🎨

Figma-style panel

Colour picker, font size, spacing, border radius, layout — all the controls designers already know.

💾

Writes back to source

Hit Apply and your changes write directly to the JSX or CSS file. No copy-pasting, no regenerating.

🤖

AI-ready

Saves a .inspect-canvas.json file so GitHub Copilot and Claude know exactly what element to update.

⚛️

React + Tailwind

Understands Tailwind classes. Changes font-size 18px → adds text-lg, removes conflicting classes.

▲

Next.js aware

Skips RSC and server action files automatically. Patches client components and triggers HMR.

What people are saying

From designers tired of waiting, and engineers tired of being pinged.

"I used to spend 30 minutes in DevTools every time the AI got a padding slightly wrong. Now I just click it and change it. It's insane how much time this saves."

Priya K.

Product Designer, early user

"The AI generates 90% of the UI perfectly. inspect-canvas handles the last 10% — the tweaks that used to require a developer."

Marco L.

Indie hacker

"I hand this to designers and they stop pinging me for every colour change. My PR queue is so much quieter."

Soo H.

Frontend engineer

inspect-canvas·© 2026
